title: Add Mermaid flowchart for ? operator error propagation
description: ferrum-introduction-to-option-result.md shows the ? operator as shorthand for match, but the control flow (success continues, error returns early to caller) is described in prose. A flowchart with two paths — Ok(value) unwraps and continues, Err(e) returns immediately — would reinforce how ? changes control flow, which is the main thing beginners get wrong.
